title: Typed Async Work, Platform APIs, and Cancellation · Type-System Trace: Platform Lib Types
summary: Coordinate public-data requests, cancellation, retries, and UI state across browser and server boundaries. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts platform lib types increment in a typed cancellable data coordinator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select DOM, worker, iterable, and server type libraries that match the real runtime without leaking incompatible globals.
Narrow event targets and DOM queries without non-null assertions or unsound global casts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
